name: source-build-au
description: Aggregated Claude Code skill collection: 54 trading skills, 40+ marketing skills, and 270+ engineering/product/leadership skills

metadata.description: Source Build AU aggregates production-ready skill packages from multiple upstream repositories into a single installable collection.

plugins.name: claude-trading-skills
plugins.description: 54 trading and market analysis skills: technical analysis, market breadth, sector rotation, earnings plays, dividend screening, backtesting, portfolio management, edge strategy development, and more.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 40+ marketing and growth skills: copywriting, CRO, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, email, social media, video, pricing, referrals, analytics, customer research, and more.

plugins.name: claude-code-skills
plugins.description: 270+ production-ready skills across 9 domains: engineering (advanced + core), marketing, c-level advisory, product, regulatory/QMS, project management, business growth, and finance.

plugins.name: awesome-claude-code-subagents
plugins.description: Curated collection of Claude Code subagents across development, infrastructure, data/AI, quality, security, and specialized domains.
